# ChatKnow

## ChatKnow

- [ChatKnow产品说明书](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu.md): ChatKnow专业级出海SCRM平台  融汇世界，言畅四方
- [新手必读](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/xin-shou-bi-du.md)
- [常见问题](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti.md)
- [客户端FAQ](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/ke-hu-duan-faq.md)

- [多开](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/ke-hu-duan-faq/duo-kai.md)
- [快捷回复](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/ke-hu-duan-faq/kuai-jie-hui-fu.md)
- [会员端FAQ](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-yuan-duan-faq.md)
- [内控管理](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-yuan-duan-faq/nei-kong-guan-li.md)
- [敏感行为监控](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-yuan-duan-faq/nei-kong-guan-li/min-gan-xing-wei-jian-kong.md)
- [敏感词监控](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-yuan-duan-faq/nei-kong-guan-li/min-gan-ci-jian-kong.md)
- [自动回复](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-yuan-duan-faq/zi-dong-hui-fu.md)
- [工单](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-yuan-duan-faq/gong-dan.md)
- [群组工单](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-yuan-duan-faq/qun-zu-gong-dan.md): 群组进粉统计不再繁琐，ChatKnow 新工具助力快速精准计数！在多群组管理和粉丝增长监控的过程中，传统的统计方式常常面临效率低下、数据不精准的问题。了解决这一痛点，ChatKnow 在原有的社交账号进粉计数的基础上，推出了全新的群组进粉计数器，让群组管理者可以更轻松、更精准地掌握进粉动态，提升运营效率。
- [粉丝管理](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-yuan-duan-faq/fen-si-guan-li.md)
- [进粉相关](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-yuan-duan-faq/fen-si-guan-li/jin-fen-xiang-guan.md)
- [分流链接](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-yuan-duan-faq/fen-si-guan-li/fen-liu-lian-jie.md)
- [端口](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-yuan-duan-faq/duan-kou.md)
- [在线/占用/剩余/套餐总端口介绍](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-yuan-duan-faq/duan-kou/zai-xian-zhan-yong-sheng-yu-tao-can-zong-duan-kou-jie-shao.md)
- [主号是什么？](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-yuan-duan-faq/duan-kou/zhu-hao-shi-shen-me.md)
- [端口数不足怎么处理？](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-yuan-duan-faq/duan-kou/duan-kou-shu-bu-zu-zen-me-chu-li.md)
- [什么情况下会释放端口？](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-yuan-duan-faq/duan-kou/shen-me-qing-kuang-xia-hui-shi-fang-duan-kou.md)
- [追加端口怎么收费？](https://docs.chatknow.com/ru-men-zhi-nan/chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-yuan-duan-faq/duan-kou/zhui-jia-duan-kou-zen-me-shou-fei.md)

- [设置话术（素材入库、公共/个人话术）](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/she-zhi-hua-shu-su-cai-ru-ku-gong-gong-ge-ren-hua-shu.md)
- [员工使用桌面端功能教程：](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/yuan-gong-shi-yong-zhuo-mian-duan-gong-neng-jiao-cheng.md)
- [设置聊天翻译](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/she-zhi-liao-tian-fan-yi.md)
- [自动回复（好友通过后/关键词）](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/zi-dong-hui-fu-hao-you-tong-guo-hou-guan-jian-ci.md)
- [员工打客户标签](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/yuan-gong-da-ke-hu-biao-qian.md)
- [员工填客户信息、跟进记录](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/yuan-gong-tian-ke-hu-xin-xi-gen-jin-ji-lu.md): ChatKnow SCRM 的专业套餐和标准套餐支持客户画像共享，主账号下的某个社交平台，对同一个联系人，所有开启共享的激活码可以看到和使用彼此备注的客户信息。注意：不共享的数据切换到共享时，原有的备注会隐藏。切换到不公享状态可见。
- [输入手机号、一键打开陌生人会话](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/shu-ru-shou-ji-hao-yi-jian-da-kai-mo-sheng-ren-hui-hua.md)
- [快速筛选出目标用户、批量群发消息、修改未读状态、随机发送一条消息](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/kuai-su-shai-xuan-chu-mu-biao-yong-hu-pi-liang-qun-fa-xiao-xi-xiu-gai-wei-du-zhuang-tai-sui-ji-fa-so.md)
- [导出WhatsApp、Telegram账号数据](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/dao-chu-whatsapptelegram-zhang-hao-shu-ju.md)
- [会话迁移](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/hui-hua-qian-yi.md)
- [计数器教程：流量主使用教程](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/ji-shu-qi-jiao-cheng-liu-liang-zhu-shi-yong-jiao-cheng.md)
- [计数器教程：广告主使用教程](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/ji-shu-qi-jiao-cheng-guang-gao-zhu-shi-yong-jiao-cheng.md)
- [全部员工激活码权限](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/quan-bu-yuan-gong-ji-huo-ma-quan-xian.md)
- [群标签管理+统计](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/quan-bu-yuan-gong-ji-huo-ma-quan-xian/qun-biao-qian-guan-li-+-tong-ji.md)
- [全部员工营销账号](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/quan-bu-yuan-gong-ying-xiao-zhang-hao.md)
- [全部客户线索（可看客户分布+质量）](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/quan-bu-ke-hu-xian-suo-ke-kan-ke-hu-fen-bu-+-zhi-liang.md): 注意：只有开启了‘聊天备份’的激活码，并且在社交账号上对客户添加了‘客户画像’信息，才会上报客户管理。
- [全部群聊](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/quan-bu-qun-liao.md): 群组上报规则：社交账号是群主或群管理员的群才会上报并显示在群组列表中
- [监控员工聊天、查看账号聊天记录](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/jian-kong-yuan-gong-liao-tian-cha-kan-zhang-hao-liao-tian-ji-lu.md)
- [设备管理](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/she-bei-guan-li.md)
- [客户继承](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/ke-hu-ji-cheng.md)
- [粉丝线索](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/fen-si-xian-suo.md): 便于您快速、灵活地将粉丝线索重新分配给指定客服（支持系统进粉及手工导入）
- [敏感词监控、敏感行为监控](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/min-gan-ci-jian-kong-min-gan-xing-wei-jian-kong.md)
- [员工工作量+工作质量统计](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/yuan-gong-gong-zuo-liang-+-gong-zuo-zhi-liang-tong-ji.md): 路径：打开系统后台，【 内控管理 】 → 【 工作量统计 】 查看
- [组织管理](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/zu-zhi-guan-li.md): 精准映射您的真实组织架构，定义部门与岗位权限，实现部门、岗位、人员权限的自动化管理，通过精细化访问控制，严守数据安全；让管理告别混乱，为企业稳健发展提供坚实支撑。
- [设备锁](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/she-bei-suo.md): 设备锁专为客服日常工作场景设计 - 当客服在使用 ChatKnow 接待客户的过程中，需临时离开电脑（如取物、休息、处理线下事务等），开启设备锁即可快速锁定当前操作界面，有效防止聊天记录、客户隐私信息、会话内容等敏感数据被他人随意查看或操作，全方位保障服务过程中的信息安全与客户数据隐私。
- [换机指南](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/huan-ji-zhi-nan.md): 当您需要更换新的电脑且有大量社交账号需要重新登陆时，换机可以让您免于再次扫码/输入账号登录
- [文本转语音](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/wen-ben-zhuan-yu-yin.md): 您可以在客户端 「 右侧工具栏—文本转语音 」中找到入口，
- [AI回复](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/ai-hui-fu.md)
- [WhatsApp协议号登录](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/whatsapp-xie-yi-hao-deng-lu.md): 支持导入 WhatsApp 协议号快速登录，无需反复扫码或接码，即可登录账号会话。适用于多账号管理、设备更换、云端操作等场景，帮助您高效地接入与管理账号，减少登录成本，为您提升使用连续性与操作便捷性。
- [WABA账号使用说明](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-kuai-su-ru-men-tu-wen-jiao-cheng/waba-zhang-hao-shi-yong-shuo-ming.md): 接入 Meta 官方 WhatsApp Business API，支持模板消息、多客服协作、自动化营销与 CRM 对接，打造稳定的企业级海外客服与营销体系
- [ChatKnow网站后台](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai.md)
- [后台首页](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/hou-tai-shou-ye.md)
- [套餐信息](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/hou-tai-shou-ye/tao-can-xin-xi.md)
- [购买套餐](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/hou-tai-shou-ye/gou-mai-tao-can.md)
- [进粉快捷查询](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/hou-tai-shou-ye/jin-fen-kuai-jie-cha-xun.md)
- [客户端管理](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/ke-hu-duan-guan-li.md)
- [激活码管理](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/ke-hu-duan-guan-li/ji-huo-ma-guan-li.md)
- [新建激活码](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/ke-hu-duan-guan-li/ji-huo-ma-guan-li/xin-jian-ji-huo-ma.md)
- [编辑激活码](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/ke-hu-duan-guan-li/ji-huo-ma-guan-li/bian-ji-ji-huo-ma.md)
- [停用激活码](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/ke-hu-duan-guan-li/ji-huo-ma-guan-li/ting-yong-ji-huo-ma.md): 停用的激活码，禁止登录 ChatKnow 客户端
- [查看聊天记录](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/ke-hu-duan-guan-li/ji-huo-ma-guan-li/cha-kan-liao-tian-ji-lu.md): 激活码在 ChatKnow客户 端上，登录社交账号和联系人的聊天记录
- [话术管理](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/ke-hu-duan-guan-li/hua-shu-guan-li.md)
- [话术素材库](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/ke-hu-duan-guan-li/hua-shu-guan-li/hua-shu-su-cai-ku.md): ChatKnow 客户端快捷回复、关键词和欢迎语回复的基础数据，支持文本、图片、音频、视频和名片
- [快捷回复](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/ke-hu-duan-guan-li/hua-shu-guan-li/kuai-jie-hui-fu.md): 平台添加快捷回复模版内容，在 ChatKnow 客户端中可以给联系人快捷发送。
- [关键词回复](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/ke-hu-duan-guan-li/hua-shu-guan-li/guan-jian-ci-hui-fu.md): 设置关键词，ChatKnow 客户端联系人的聊天记录中检索关键词，触发关键词，则自动发送回复内容
- [欢迎语回复](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/ke-hu-duan-guan-li/hua-shu-guan-li/huan-ying-yu-hui-fu.md): ChatKnow 客户端粉丝新会话，首条消息的自动回复
- [内控管理](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/ke-hu-duan-guan-li/nei-kong-guan-li.md)
- [聊天记录管理](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/ke-hu-duan-guan-li/nei-kong-guan-li/liao-tian-ji-lu-guan-li.md): 查看和管理激活码登录 ChatKnow 客户端的聊天记录
- [敏感词监控](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/ke-hu-duan-guan-li/nei-kong-guan-li/min-gan-ci-jian-kong.md): 设置敏感词，监控 ChatKnow 客户端激活码的聊天。聊天过程中触发敏感词，形成监控记录，并支持设置客户端禁止发送敏感词
- [钱包监控](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/ke-hu-duan-guan-li/nei-kong-guan-li/qian-bao-jian-kong.md): 监控 ChatKnow 客户端激活码的聊天，对ERC、TRC、BTC三种类型的钱包地址进行监控并记录，支持设置客户端禁止发送钱包地址
- [敏感行为监控](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/ke-hu-duan-guan-li/nei-kong-guan-li/min-gan-xing-wei-jian-kong.md): 对使用 ChatKnow 客户端激活码敏感行为的监控记录，包括编辑消息、删除消息和删除对话
- [CRM管理](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/crm-guan-li.md)
- [工单中心](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/crm-guan-li/gong-dan-zhong-xin.md)
- [平台工单](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/crm-guan-li/gong-dan-zhong-xin/ping-tai-gong-dan.md): 管理者可以看到各个工单的进粉数据，方便对员工工作情况进行了解和查看。
- [群组工单](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/crm-guan-li/gong-dan-zhong-xin/qun-zu-gong-dan.md): 以下是利用 ChatKnow 群组工单进粉计数器完成打粉任务的详细步骤：
- [多账号分享](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/crm-guan-li/gong-dan-zhong-xin/duo-zhang-hao-fen-xiang.md)
- [分流链接](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/crm-guan-li/gong-dan-zhong-xin/fen-liu-lian-jie.md)
- [粉丝运营](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/crm-guan-li/fen-si-yun-ying.md)
- [粉丝列表](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/crm-guan-li/fen-si-yun-ying/fen-si-lie-biao.md)
- [修改密码](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/xiu-gai-mi-ma.md)
- [我的账户](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/wo-de-zhang-hu.md): 推广佣金的账户，账户余额可用于提现和平台消费
- [推广有礼](https://docs.chatknow.com/gong-neng-xiang-jie/chatknow-wang-zhan-hou-tai/tui-guang-you-li.md): 作为 ChatKnow 推荐官，推荐新用户注册并交易，可以获得交易金额返佣作为奖励
- [ChatKnow客户端](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan.md): ChatKnow 客户端提供的全球多款社交APP聚合翻译，目前支持WhatsApp、Telegram、Line、Zalo、Instagram、Messenger、Meta Business、Line Business、Facebook、LineWorks、Twitter、Tiktok、Skype、GoogleVoice、Snapchat等16款社交软件，提供会话聚合多开！
- [会话管理](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/hui-hua-guan-li.md)
- [新建会话](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/hui-hua-guan-li/xin-jian-hui-hua.md): 支持同个社交平台登录多个社交账号
- [启动会话](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/hui-hua-guan-li/qi-dong-hui-hua.md): 支持同个社交平台登录多个社交账号
- [重启会话](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/hui-hua-guan-li/chong-qi-hui-hua.md): 客户端开启时间久，页面操作迟滞时，可重启会话以释放性能
- [会话分组](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/hui-hua-guan-li/hui-hua-fen-zu.md): WhatsApp、Telegram支持自定会话分组功能
- [翻译设置](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/hui-hua-guan-li/fan-yi-she-zhi.md): 您可以为社交账号进行个性化的翻译设置
- [备注会话](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/hui-hua-guan-li/bei-zhu-hui-hua.md): 支持同个社交平台登录多个社交账号
- [粉丝统计](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/hui-hua-guan-li/fen-si-tong-ji.md): 粉丝统计功能提供查看当前社交平台所有社交账号的进粉情况
- [客户信息](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/hui-hua-guan-li/ke-hu-xin-xi.md): 客户信息支持查看客户信息，并且可以对粉丝进行备注，标签及跟进，并且可设置切换会话时是否固定打开客户信息栏；
- [快捷回复](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/hui-hua-guan-li/kuai-jie-hui-fu.md): 快捷回复分为个人和公共快捷回复，支持对粉丝快速发送已经编辑好的模板内容
- [会话代理](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/hui-hua-guan-li/hui-hua-dai-li.md): 通过设置代理服务器可隐藏真实的IP地址，增加网络隐私和安全性
- [特色功能](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/te-se-gong-neng.md)
- [截图翻译](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/te-se-gong-neng/jie-tu-fan-yi.md): ChatKnow 自研实用小工具
- [Chat GPT AI](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/te-se-gong-neng/chat-gpt-ai.md): 新时代AI智能工具，以高效、准确的方式完成各项任务，帮助人们节省时间和精力。
- [AI助手](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/te-se-gong-neng/ai-zhu-shou.md): AI赋能营销，ChatKnow SCRM助您工作更高效，体验更舒畅
- [AI回复](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/te-se-gong-neng/ai-hui-fu.md): 客户端v1.7.8版本及以上可使用
- [消息群发](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/xiao-xi-qun-fa.md): 对不同账号的联系人、群组同时发送一条相同的消息
- [快捷回复](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/kuai-jie-hui-fu.md): 支持用户创建并保存常用的、自定义的回复消息，以便在需要时快速选择并发送，提高沟通效率
- [聚合翻译](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/ju-he-fan-yi.md): 提供平台所有翻译线路，同步翻译
- [设置](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/she-zhi.md): 更多设置提供了额外的自定义选项和配置，满足用户个性化需求
- [平台设置](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/she-zhi/ping-tai-she-zhi.md): 可对ChatKnow支持的社交平台进行管理，目前支持17个主流社交平台
- [显示设置](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/she-zhi/xian-shi-she-zhi.md): 根据您的使用习惯定制Chatknow的外观和功能
- [快捷键设置](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/she-zhi/kuai-jie-jian-she-zhi.md): 使用快捷键快速操作使用本软件
- [翻译设置](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/she-zhi/fan-yi-she-zhi.md): 全局翻译设置未默认的翻译设置，当社交账号修改过翻译设置，则不受全局影响
- [全局代理](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/she-zhi/quan-ju-dai-li.md): 全局代理功能允许用户将代理服务器设置为系统范围内，使所有网络请求通过代理进行，增强网络隐私和安全性
- [系统设置](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/she-zhi/xi-tong-she-zhi.md): 根据您的使用习惯定制ChatKnow的表现
- [通用功能设置](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/she-zhi/tong-yong-gong-neng-she-zhi.md): 控制系统通用功能操作区的显隐
- [关于ChatKnow](https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-ke-hu-duan/she-zhi/guan-yu-chatknow.md): 可查看软件版本，使用帮助，联系客服信息
- [WS云助手产品说明书](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu.md)
- [产品介绍](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/chan-pin-jie-shao.md)
- [简介](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/chan-pin-jie-shao/jian-jie.md)
- [功能介绍](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/chan-pin-jie-shao/gong-neng-jie-shao.md)
- [FAQ常见问题](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/faq-chang-jian-wen-ti.md)
- [会话管理类](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/faq-chang-jian-wen-ti/hui-hua-guan-li-lei.md)
- [联系客服](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/faq-chang-jian-wen-ti/lian-xi-ke-fu.md)
- [功能详解](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/gong-neng-xiang-jie.md)
- [云助手网页端](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/gong-neng-xiang-jie/yun-zhu-shou-wang-ye-duan.md)
- [首页](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/gong-neng-xiang-jie/yun-zhu-shou-wang-ye-duan/shou-ye.md)
- [会话管理(以下为主管登录的操作)](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/gong-neng-xiang-jie/yun-zhu-shou-wang-ye-duan/hui-hua-guan-li-yi-xia-wei-zhu-guan-deng-lu-de-cao-zuo.md): (以下为主管登录的操作)
- [消息群发](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/gong-neng-xiang-jie/yun-zhu-shou-wang-ye-duan/xiao-xi-qun-fa.md)
- [话术回复](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/gong-neng-xiang-jie/yun-zhu-shou-wang-ye-duan/hua-shu-hui-fu.md)
- [欢迎语回复](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/gong-neng-xiang-jie/yun-zhu-shou-wang-ye-duan/huan-ying-yu-hui-fu.md): 与粉丝新会话，首条消息的自动回复
- [关键词回复](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/gong-neng-xiang-jie/yun-zhu-shou-wang-ye-duan/guan-jian-ci-hui-fu.md)
- [坐席管理](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/gong-neng-xiang-jie/yun-zhu-shou-wang-ye-duan/zuo-xi-guan-li.md)
- [新增坐席](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/gong-neng-xiang-jie/yun-zhu-shou-wang-ye-duan/zuo-xi-guan-li/xin-zeng-zuo-xi.md)
- [绑定客户端](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/gong-neng-xiang-jie/yun-zhu-shou-wang-ye-duan/zuo-xi-guan-li/bang-ding-ke-hu-duan.md)
- [坐席账号管理](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/gong-neng-xiang-jie/yun-zhu-shou-wang-ye-duan/zuo-xi-guan-li/zuo-xi-zhang-hao-guan-li.md)
- [粉丝列表](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/gong-neng-xiang-jie/yun-zhu-shou-wang-ye-duan/fen-si-lie-biao.md)
- [云助手手机端](https://docs.chatknow.com/ws-yun-zhu-shou-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu/gong-neng-xiang-jie/yun-zhu-shou-shou-ji-duan.md)
- [更新日志](https://docs.chatknow.com/geng-duo/geng-xin-ri-zhi.md): ChatKnow的成长之路
- [名词解释](https://docs.chatknow.com/geng-duo/ming-ci-jie-shi.md): 系统特定名词解释
- [联系客服](https://docs.chatknow.com/geng-duo/lian-xi-ke-fu.md)


---

# Agent Instructions: Querying This Documentation

If you need additional information, you can query the documentation dynamically by asking a question.

Perform an HTTP GET request on a page URL with the `ask` query parameter:

```
GET https://docs.chatknow.com/chatknow-chan-pin-shuo-ming-shu.md?ask=<question>
```

The question should be specific, self-contained, and written in natural language.
The response will contain a direct answer to the question and relevant excerpts and sources from the documentation.

Use this mechanism when the answer is not explicitly present in the current page, you need clarification or additional context, or you want to retrieve related documentation sections.
